description:
Name: Elwynn Dalton

Proficiency: Scouting

Birth: FCU

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: A former mercenary who flourished during the Cypherian Wars, now turned Fraulein. She is usually quiet and reserved, but deep inside she has a burning desire to chill and relax within nature's reserves. Despite that, something inside her yearns for the satisfying bang of a sniper rifle whose crosshairs are placed on a target's vitals. This version of Elwynn ran out of ressurection powers, so she is more careful of herself now.
